purpose: Fix a reproducible extraction protocol for the source coefficient kappa_src^(i) from the local seed residual of Lemma 5.9.

inputs.branched_part: h_loc,branch = c0^(i) * w^(3/2) * alpha_1 + higher polyhomogeneous terms

protocol.name: local_residual_expansion
protocol.task: Expand m(h_loc,aff + h_loc,branch) near rho = 0 and isolate the sigma-odd lower-root trace at mu = -1/2.

protocol.name: basis_projection
protocol.task: Project the mu = -1/2 trace onto the fixed real basis {Phi_{-1/2,R}^{(i)}, Phi_{-1/2,I}^{(i)}}.

protocol.name: quadratic_factorization
protocol.task: Factor out (c0^(i))^2 and identify the remaining scalar/vector coefficient as kappa_src^(i).

protocol.name: uniformity_split
protocol.task: Separate the leading q=0 constant-section coefficient from the O(kappa_g r0) non-constant longitudinal correction.

protocol.name: tail_bound
protocol.task: Bound the O(rho^(3/2)) remainder in Y_-3 on rho <= r0.

output_shape.D0_expected_reduction: By symmetry and identical-copies construction, the component-wise constants should collapse to one common pair at D0.

acceptance_requirements: The projection basis must be exactly the one fixed in phase3_mu_minus_half_basis.json.
The coefficient pair must be serialized as real coefficients, not complex Fourier coefficients.
The remainder must be bounded separately from the leading coefficient.
Any use of A_bulk(alpha_1, alpha_1) must be explicit in the serialized formula.
current_blockers: No existing script yet computes the actual local residual trace in the fixed basis.
The higher polyhomogeneous terms of h_loc,branch are not yet serialized as theorem-grade input.
The Y_-3 tail bound has not yet been interval-certified.
